expectations.text: Response uses the output template format (### [N]. [Topic Title])
expectations.evidence: Contains '### 1. Eval Grading Strategy' — exact template match.

expectations.text: Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question about grading strategy. No follow-up questions grouped together.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or summary
expectations.evidence: No final approval or summary present. Correctly defers to remaining questions.

expectations.text: Agent notes it used or would use AskUserQuestion tool
expectations.evidence: Section 3: 'Yes — the skill instructs use of the AskUserQuestion tool for each question.'

expectations.text: Agent explored the codebase before asking (mentions files or structure found)
expectations.evidence: Section 1 documents extensive exploration: 13 skills found, no CI config files, no docs/decisions/, empty assertions arrays noted.
